overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese temple garden at night. The character exits a wooden gate and follows an illuminated path lined with stone lanterns, passing a large cherry blossom tree before continuing up a mountain trail.

events.description: exiting the covered wooden gate structure into the open garden

agents.ego_description: samurai character wearing a straw hat walks through the wooden gate structure into the garden

entered.detail: large dark wooden temple gate frame with thick beams
stone wall lining the right side of the gate entrance
illuminated traditional paper lantern hanging at the gate exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a samurai character walking through a dark wooden temple gate at night. The character moves from the sheltered gate interior toward the garden exit, passing stone walls and illuminated by a hanging paper lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated garden path with traditional stone lanterns

events.description: path becomes more illuminated by multiple stone lanterns as the garden opens up

agents.ego_description: walking along the garden path passing stone lanterns on both sides while approaching the large cherry blossom tree

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lanterns illuminating the dirt path
large tree with pink-purple cherry blossom foliage visible in the distance
wooden fence lining the left side of the garden path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an illuminated garden path lined with traditional stone lanterns. A large cherry blossom tree becomes visible in the distance as the character moves deeper into the garden, passing wooden fences and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden area with prominent cherry blossom tree and stone lanterns

events.description: passing the large cherry blossom tree and transitioning to more open mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: walking past the large cherry blossom tree while following the illuminated path toward the mountain trail

entered.detail: large rocks and boulders along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the large cherry blossom tree, which dominates the left side of the frame with its pink-purple foliage. The path continues past rock formations and stone lanterns as the garden transitions to more open mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky outcrops and hillside

events.description: path begins to ascend slightly uphill through rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the mountain trail surrounded by rocks and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: grassy hillside sloping upward on the right side of the trail
dense forest visible in the valley below the mountain path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the mountain trail, leaving the cherry blossom tree behind. The path ascends through rocky terrain with large boulders and a grassy hillside on the right, while distant forests become visible in the valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai travels from the sheltered confines of a temple gate into the expansive wilderness of a moonlit mountain. It begins within the dark interior of a wooden gate, moving past stone walls under the glow of a hanging paper lantern. As the character exits, the scene opens into a garden where the camera follows an illuminated path lined with traditional stone lanterns and wooden fences. The view then shifts to be dominated by the pink-purple foliage of a massive cherry blossom tree on the left before the manicured garden transitions into rugged mountain terrain. Finally, the path ascends through a landscape of large boulders and grassy hillsides, leaving the temple behind to reveal distant forests in the valley below.
